'''EV-2-E''' was an [[EV-series supervisor droid/Legends|EV-series supervisor droid]]<ref name="Rules of Engagement" /> manufactured by [[MerenData/Legends|MerenData]].<ref name="Manufacturer" /> [[Time/Legends|Sometime]] between the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Corellian Treaty|formation]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and its subsequent [[First Conference of Free Peoples|reorganization]] into the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] to the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], respectively. As such, it can be determined that EV-2-E served in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet's]] [[14th Roving Line]] [[Time/Legends|sometime]] between these two events.</ref> it served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Fleet's]] [[14th Roving Line]] as a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Supervisor droid/Legends|overseer]] onboard the line's<ref name="Rules of Engagement" /> [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|286|''Mantan Wanderer''}}</ref> the ''[[Mantan Wanderer]]'', during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Rules of Engagement" />

==Behind the scenes==
EV-2-E was first mentioned in ''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]'', a [[1997]] [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] supplement written by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Rules of Engagement" />
